title: Get a termination of services or layoff certificate
description: Employers complete this form to give to a worker who has stopped working.
summary: Employers must complete a Termination of Services or Layoff Certificate when an employee stops working, under Regulation 47 of the National Insurance and Social Security Act.
The worker uses this certificate to claim unemployment benefit.
who_can_apply: the employer of someone who has stopped working
a worker can ask their former employer for the certificate

items: the worker’s name, address, National Insurance Number and National Registration Number
the reason the worker stopped working
the worker’s earnings for the last 12 weeks of work

documents.intro: The employer will need to provide:

items.name: Payroll records for the last 12 weeks

how_long: Most employers can complete the certificate within a week.

options.heading: By post or in person
content: The completed certificate must be returned to the National Insurance Office, or given to the worker to take with them.
